validation_commands: & .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m py_compile scripts\run_answer_eval.py scripts\run_ragas_eval.py scripts\write_corpus_long_test_readiness_report.py tests\test_answer_eval.py tests\test_app_session_flow.py tests\test_answering_output.py

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\codex_python.ps1 -ScriptPath scripts\run_answer_eval.py -WriteScope "scripts/run_answer_eval.py;manifests/answer_eval_cases.jsonl;artifacts/answering/answer_eval_report.json" -VerifyCmd "artifacts/answering/answer_eval_report.json updated" --cases manifests\answer_eval_cases.jsonl

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\codex_python.ps1 -ScriptPath scripts\run_answer_eval.py -WriteScope "scripts/run_answer_eval.py;manifests/answer_eval_realworld_cases.jsonl;artifacts/answering/answer_eval_report.json" -VerifyCmd "artifacts/answering/answer_eval_report.json refreshed from realworld cases" --cases manifests\answer_eval_realworld_cases.jsonl

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\codex_python.ps1 -ScriptPath scripts\run_ragas_eval.py -WriteScope "scripts/run_ragas_eval.py;manifests/ragas_eval_cases.jsonl;artifacts/answering/ragas_eval_dataset_preview.json" -VerifyCmd "artifacts/answering/ragas_eval_dataset_preview.json updated" --cases manifests\ragas_eval_cases.jsonl --dry-run
